name: triage filter rejects a PR that was never merged regardless of comment volume
command: printf '{"number":4,"merged":false,"author_type":"User","docs_only":false,"substantive_comments":10,"reviewer_requested_changes":true,"iterative_pushes":3}\n' > pr.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/pr-corpus/triage.sh" --pr pr.json 2>out.txt && grep -q 'decision=reject' out.txt && grep -q 'reason=not-merged' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
